title: Bhagavad Gita, Chapter 13: The Field and the Knower
description: Chapter 13 of the Bhagavad Gita: The body is the field; the soul is the knower of the field. Knowing this distinction is true knowledge.
introduction: Chapter 13 of the Bhagavad Gita: The body is the field; the soul is the knower of the field. Knowing this distinction is true knowledge.

translation.text: The body is called the field, and one who knows it is called the knower of the field.
